description_long: This is an adult male figure with a bald head, wearing a casual short-sleeve t-shirt and a pair of jeans. The t-shirt features a printed design or text on the chest area, and the jeans are straight-cut, fitting loosely around the legs. The figure's arms are relaxed and slightly bent at the elbows, with hands hanging naturally by the sides. The posture is upright, with the head slightly tilted downward, giving a contemplative or neutral expression. The footwear appears to be simple, closed-toe shoes, and there are no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A bald adult male in a casual t-shirt and jeans, standing upright with relaxed arms and simple shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the t-shirt's printed design, facial features, and relaxed arm position.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the drape of the t-shirt, and the straight leg of the jeans.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the plain back of the t-shirt, and the fit of the jeans.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the jeans.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and straight-cut jeans
